copy.description:
Brookline Select Board Meeting - January 27, 2026

At the Brookline Select Board meeting on January 27, 2026, several topics were discussed, including updates on community engagement efforts, snow clearing responsibilities, and the fiscal year 2027 budget process. The board highlighted the need for improved communication and the importance of clearing fire hydrants and sidewalks after snowstorms [10:30, 96:24].
